page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows balanced performance across compute and memory operations. The instance achieved a PassMark CPU score of 36,823.03 and a PassMark memory score of 2,804.95, which ranks in the top 25% tier. In memory bandwidth tests, it recorded 1,690.54 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 155.4 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. For database-related workloads, the server processed 31.42 million Redis SET operations per second and scored 15,203.45 on PassMark database operations. Large language model inference using a small 135M model reached 311.53 tokens per second for text generation, placing it in the top 25% performance bracket.

The absence of local NVMe storage and GPU accelerators represents a key architectural tradeoff, making this instance less suitable for heavy local I/O caching or hardware-accelerated machine learning training. However, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density provide predictable performance for memory-intensive applications. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require large memory footprints without the overhead of expensive GPU accelerators. Recommended workloads include in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise application servers, and memory-bound data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B x86_64 processor running at 2.9 GHz. Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, it provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate strong memory capabilities, with a PassMark memory score in the top 25% and a cached small-block read bandwidth of 1,690.54 GB/sec. It also demonstrates solid database performance, executing 31.42 million Redis SET operations per second. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications that do not require local NVMe drives. It is well-suited for in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and memory-bound enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for in-memory databases and caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7se.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM under a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated x86_64 memory-optimized platform featuring 256 GB RAM and 32 physical cores for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core for memory-heavy tasks
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong memory performance with a PassMark memory score in the top 25%
Optimized for in-memory databases, Redis caching, and enterprise applications
